prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年安徽大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次依次约为23852名→24652名→21596名→22625名→19448名，整体呈波动中前移趋势，近两年位次明显提升（2024 年22625名→2025年19448名，前移约3177名），2025年基准位次约19448名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划逐年递减：2021年83人、2022年82人、2023年79人、20 24年76人、2025年72人；2026年计划招生67人，较2025年减少5人（缩招约6.9%），连续第六年缩减计划，招生名额持续收紧对竞争格局有一定影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 安徽大学为211工程、国家双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第101位，近年排名稳定在90–104名区间，属于中上游211院校，在安徽省内仅次于中国科学 技术大学和合肥工业大学；该校2023年高考周期内曾出现师德师风类偏负面舆情事件（运动会着装争议），但影响范围有限；2026年声誉文件中无该校条目；抖 音学校热度总排名第84位，评价为「一般」，综合热度约27.7万，短视频平台曝光度处于中等偏下水平，未见明显报考热度异常信号；第五轮学科评估数据中未 收录安徽大学A-及以上等级学科，该校优势学科主要集中在B+档（如应用经济学、法学、新闻传播学等），整体学科实力在211高校中处于中等水平，缺乏顶尖学科对高分考生的 强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业为「高热推荐」或「推荐」，与安徽大学在浙招生专 业（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、电子信息工程、电气工程等）高度契合，相关专业热度持续走高可能吸引更多考生报考；浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年 29.08万人大幅增长约37.5%，考生规模显著扩大加剧了整体竞争压力；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，与浙江省地理相邻， 交通便利，对浙江考生具有一定地域吸引力；该校在浙江省招生人数占比较小（近年约占总招生计划的2%–3%），属跨省招生，本地生源保护效应不明显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 历年位次波动趋势、2026年招生计划继续缩减、浙江省考生总数大幅增加以及相关工科专业热度持续走高，在2025年基准位次19448名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次约为19138 名，区间18638–19638名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约19138名，区间18638–19638名。位次在此区间内的考生可以安徽大学作为重点目标院校：一档专业（法学、会计学、思想政治教育）建议冲刺报考，录取概率较低但 值得尝试；二档专业（计算机科学与技术、电子信息工程、电气工程及其自动化、金融学、经济学、网络空间安全、人工智能、工商管理）为核心稳妥选择，与预测位次匹配度较 高，且计算机、电子信息、电气等专业社会热度高、就业前景好；三档专业（机械设计制造及其自动化、新闻传播学类、英语、数学类、光电信息科学与工程）可作为保底选择。 位次明显优于区间上限（<18638名）可重点冲击一档和二档王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（约19638名）建议以三档专业为主、二档专业为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Anhui University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 23852 → 24652 → 21596 → 22625 → 19448, showing a fluctuating but generally forward-moving trend, with significant improvement in the last two years (from 22625 in 2024 to 19448 in 2025, moving forward by about 3177 positions). The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 19448. The university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang Province has been decreasing year by year: 83 in 2021, 82 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 76 in 2024, 72 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 67 students, a decrease of 5 from 2025 (a reduction of about 6.9%), marking the sixth consecutive year of shrinking enrollment, which has a certain impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a Project 211 and national Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 101st in the 2026 main ranking of the Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings stable in the 90–104 range, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities, second only to the University of Science and Technology of China and Hefei University of Technology in Anhui Province. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was a slightly negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics (a sports attire controversy), but its impact was limited; there is no entry for this university in the 2026 reputation document. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranks 84th, with a rating of 'average' and a comprehensive popularity of about 277,000, indicating medium-to-low exposure on short video platforms, with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, no disciplines at A- or above were recorded for Anhui University; its advantageous disciplines are mainly at the B+ level (such as Applied Economics, Law, Journalism and Communication, etc.), placing the overall disciplinary strength at a medium level among 211 universities, lacking top-tier disciplines to strongly attract high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 major popularity analysis shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are 'highly recommended' or 'recommended', which highly aligns with Anhui University's majors offered in Zhejiang (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information Engineering, Electrical Engineering, etc.). The rising popularity of related majors may attract more candidates to apply. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.5% from 290,800 in 2025, greatly intensifying overall competition. Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, geographically adjacent to Zhejiang Province with convenient transportation, offering some regional appeal to Zhejiang candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Zhejiang Province is relatively small (about 2%–3% of total enrollment in recent years), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with no obvious local student protection effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the continued reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the number of candidates in Zhejiang Province, and the rising popularity of related engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 19448, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 19138, with a range of 18638–19638.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 19138, range 18638–19638. Candidates within this range can consider Anhui University as a key target: Tier 1 majors (Law, Accounting, Ideological and Political Education) are recommended as reach choices, with low admission probability but worth trying; Tier 2 majors (Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Information Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Finance, Economics, Cyberspace Security, Artificial Intelligence, Business Administration) are the core safe choices, with high match to the predicted ranking, and majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering have high social popularity and good employment prospects; Tier 3 majors (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Journalism and Communication, English, Mathematics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering) can serve as safety choices. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<18638) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 and Tier 2 flagship majors; those with rankings near the lower limit (about 19638) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors supplemented by Tier 2 majors.
